creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012
New Revision: 301675
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301675

Log:
  p5-libsoldout is a perl module to access the C library libsoldout.
  The initial version just implements functions to convert markdown
  input to html including strict markdown, discount markdown and
  specific extensions only available in libsoldout.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/libsoldout/
  
  PR:		ports/170086
  Submitted by:	Rodrigo Osorio <rodrigo@bebik.net>

Added:
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/textproc/Makefile

Modified: head/textproc/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/Makefile	Sun Jul 29 01:45:35 2012	(r301674)
+++ head/textproc/Makefile	Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012	(r301675)
@@ -1018,6 +1018,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-YAPE-Regex-Explain
     SUBDIR += p5-ack
     SUBDIR += p5-dTemplate
+    SUBDIR += p5-libsoldout
     SUBDIR += p5-libxml
     SUBDIR += p5-pod2pdf
     SUBDIR += p5-podlators

Added: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/Makefile	Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012	(r301675)
@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-libsoldout
+# Date created:				2012-07-22
+# Whom:					Rodrigo OSORIO <rodrigo@bebik.net>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	libsoldout
+PORTVERSION=	0.02
+CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:ROS
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	rodrigo@bebik.net
+COMMENT=	Convert Markdown text in (X)HTML
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	soldout:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libsoldout
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	5.10.0+
+USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+
+MAN3=		libsoldout.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 501200
+TEST_DEPENDS+=	p5-Test-Simple>=0.94:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Simple
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/distinfo	Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012	(r301675)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (libsoldout-0.02.tar.gz) = 3b821b2a946cd1b875dd28869727e1a9117ccbb0891c636c1057aa06b587f41a
+SIZE (libsoldout-0.02.tar.gz) = 46160

Added: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-descr	Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012	(r301675)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+p5-libsoldout is a perl module to access the C library libsoldout.
+The initial version just implements functions to convert markdown
+input to html including strict markdown, discount markdown and 
+specific extensions only available in libsoldout.
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/libsoldout/

Added: head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/textproc/p5-libsoldout/pkg-plist	Sun Jul 29 07:28:17 2012	(r301675)
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.so
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/libsoldout.bs
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout/.packlist
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/libsoldout.pm
+@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/libsoldout
